name: english-learning-harness
description: Local-first English conversation harness for Korean adult learners.

interface.shortDescription: Run gentle text-first English practice with local learner memory.
interface.longDescription: English Learning Harness provides low-pressure English practice flows, local learner progress scaffolding, and setup-owned hook support. Phase 1 defaults to text/transcription-first sessions because realtime voice is not yet a stable CLI path.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a gentle English learning session using the learner's local profile and progress.
